title: SKILL.md frontmatter (1.0)
description: Schema for SKILL.md frontmatter in @han-kyeon/claude-skills. Enforced by `cfh check schema` since 1.0.0 (use --legacy for 0.x warn-only behavior).

name.description: kebab-case, 1~63 chars, must start with letter. Must match directory name.

description.description: Trigger description. Should follow TRIGGER / SKIP / EXAMPLES convention (Track 4.3).

origin.description: Optional provenance URL when the skill is adapted from an external source.

commands.description: Mirror commands that invoke this skill (Track 5.1). Used by `cfh list` mapping column and `cfh check skills` mapping consistency.
